exact_structured_findings.codeword_sign_direction_distribution: <sign(d),Y> = 24 - 2 wt(c+d), hence distribution is the Golay weight enumerator

interpretation.at_weight_8_and_above: Golay constraints reappear as legitimate code-induced structure, not Hamming root defects
interpretation.below_weight_8: the Golay endpoint has exact independent Rademacher sparse projection law
interpretation.new_candidate_worst_direction: full sign direction of a Golay codeword, with K around 1.202019

not_claimed: not a proof of the sharp global K-subgaussian constant for all coefficient vectors
not a proof of multivariate convex-order domination
random search is diagnostic, not exhaustive
scope: structured and numerical probe of full Golay sign vector subgaussian/convex-order constants beyond sparse support <8
